product.name: Goaste 3 Pack Crystal Cake Display Stand with Mirror, 14" 12" 10" Metal Pedestal Gold Round Cake Plate Stand, Dessert Cookies Fruit Serving Tray with Shining Crystal Beads for Wedding, Birthday Party
features: 𝐏𝐚𝐜𝐤𝐚𝐠𝐞 𝐈𝐧𝐜𝐥𝐮𝐝𝐞: You will get 3 crystal metal cake stands in different sizes, measuring 10"Dia*2.7"H, 12"Dia*2.7"H, 14"Dia*2.7"H individually, suitable for displaying cakes, cupcakes, desserts, biscuits, cookies, candies, etc. They will meet your various needs for different cake sizes.

𝐏𝐫𝐞𝐦𝐢𝐮𝐦 𝐐𝐮𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲: Our crystal round cake stand is made of reliable metal and glass material, adopting an exquisite cutting process and a good electroplating process, which make these cake stands odorless, smooth, strong, sturdy, no need to worry about wear or tear.

𝐀𝐝𝐨𝐫𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐃𝐞𝐬𝐢𝐠𝐧: The crystal cake pedestal is designed with hand-worn crystal frames and shining beads, which can brighten up your decorations and leave a deep impression on your guests. Three ball legs are used to support the cake stand, ensuring stability on the table.

𝐄𝐥𝐞𝐠𝐚𝐧𝐭 𝐌𝐢𝐫𝐫𝐨𝐫 𝐒𝐮𝐫𝐟𝐚𝐜𝐞: This cookie serving tray features a gold metal hollow design. Removing the top protective film, the polished stainless steel mirror surface will beautifully shine under the light, attracting people's attention, making your wedding or birthday party unforgettable.

𝐌𝐮𝐥𝐭𝐢-𝐏𝐮𝐫𝐩𝐨𝐬𝐞: This luxurious and elegant cake stand is suitable for wedding, anniversary, birthday party, baby shower, company celebrations or special occasions to display your favorite cakes and desserts. It can be used for home decoration, also an ideal choice for gifts.
